title: alsine quaternella
intro: Alsine quaternella, also known as Alsine wahlenbergii or mountain saxifrage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alsine quaternella are believed to include the potential treatment of gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Alsine quaternella include infusions and decoctions, which can be prepared by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water to release its active compounds.
